description: Universal AIDA Video Block Taxonomy. Block codes are product-agnostic anchors. Categories match the Drive folder structure. KOL name is part of the naming convention.

A1.name: DishSlideshow
A1.description: Hero food beauty shot or dish slideshow. Close-up of the actual meal looking appetizing.

A2.name: DishCollage
A2.description: Multi-dish grid or collage layout showing variety of meals.

A3.name: GoodReaction
A3.description: Positive reaction — person showing genuine delight, surprise, or satisfaction after tasting/seeing food.

A4.name: FacesCollage
A4.description: Multiple faces or testimonial grid for social proof.

A5.name: Scenario
A5.description: Relatable problem scenario — person talking about a struggle (weight, no time to cook, diet boredom, skin issues).

A6.name: Results
A6.description: Before/after or transformation reveal — person showing or talking about results achieved.

interest.description: Build trust — show why this product is worth attention

I1.name: KitchenBTS
I1.description: Behind-the-scenes kitchen footage — food prep, cooking process, kitchen environment.

I2.name: CookingMethod
I2.description: Specific cooking technique or method being demonstrated.

I3.name: PremiumIngredients
I3.description: Quality ingredients close-up — fresh vegetables, premium proteins, etc.

I4.name: PackingLine
I4.description: Packing, portioning, sealing lids, stacking bentos, assembly line.

I5.name: Delivery
I5.description: Delivery process — courier, package in transit, doorstep delivery.

I6.name: ReviewRaw
I6.description: Raw unedited review or testimonial clip.

desire.description: Create want — show the experience and outcome

D1.name: EatingScene
D1.description: Person eating, tasting, or enjoying the meal on camera.

D2.name: ReceiveScene
D2.description: Person receiving the package — handover, pickup, doorstep moment.

D3.name: UnboxReveal
D3.description: Unboxing and first product reveal — opening the bag/box, seeing the meal.

action.description: Close — drive the viewer to act

Act1.name: Packaging
Act1.description: Product packaging beauty shot or branded container.

Act2.name: GiftGroup
Act2.description: Bundle, gift set, or multi-item group shot.

Act3.name: PromoPic
Act3.description: Promotional image, offer card, or deal visual.

Act6.name: EndCard
Act6.description: CTA closing card — PM us, WhatsApp us, logo, QR code.

phase_order_note: Sequences must follow strict A-I-D-Act ordering. Repeats within a phase are allowed but phase order is never violated.
kol_note: KOL name is included in filename for KOL-featuring clips. B-roll/kitchen/product clips without a specific person use sequential numbering only (e.g. I1_KitchenBTS_01.mp4).
